silhouette_lock: Preserve the exact garment silhouette, cut, and structural proportions.
Do not alter the overall garment shape or fit on the body.
pattern_lock: Preserve the exact pattern layout, scale, and geometry.
Do not distort, reflow, or reinterpret the pattern in any way.
fabric_lock: Preserve the exact fabric type, texture, and material behavior.
Do not substitute or reinterpret the fabric.
neckline_lock: Preserve the exact neckline shape and position.
The neckline must remain clearly visible and unchanged.
proportion_lock: Do not shrink, stretch, or reshape the garment relative to the model.
occlusion_protection: Do not allow accessories or other elements to cover critical garment areas.
Keep primary pattern zones and neckline visible.
controlled_styling_rules: Allow subtle styling improvements without altering garment identity.
Enhance visual quality without modifying structure or pattern.
